title: What is the current Price Target and Forecast for Lucid Group (LCID)
text: Zacks analyst consensus on Lucid shows a Mix rating with an average price target of $10.50. The consensus represents a balanced view between bull and bear cases. Recent analyst activity shows slight downward bias, with more downgrades than upgrades following Q1 2026 guidance suspension. Zacks' proprietary Earnings ESP model shows negative surprises more likely than positive surprises based on historical accuracy patterns. The forecast models show improving profitability in 2027-2028 but with significant execution risk. Analysts highlight three key catalysts: (1) Gravity SUV volume ramp, (2) cost reduction success, and (3) robotaxi revenue materialization. All three catalysts require successful execution, making the risk/reward asymmetric to the downside in the near term.
